codeReview.summary: Implementation of 4 secondary dynamics (CompensatingStrategy, StructuralTendency, AssimilationDepth, Neglect) is complete and correct. All 12 validation assertions (VAL-DYN-014 through VAL-DYN-025) are covered by comprehensive tests. The code follows Rust best practices with proper documentation, derives for traits, and configurable threshold parameters with zero hardcoded constants.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The rust-library-worker skill file was not found at the expected path, but the worker followed the documented conventions from AGENTS.md successfully. The handoff confirms skillFeedback.followedProcedure=true with no deviations.

summary: The dynamics-secondary feature is fully implemented and passes review. The implementation adds 4 secondary dynamics (CompensatingStrategy, StructuralTendency, AssimilationDepth, Neglect) to sd-core with 2267 lines of well-tested code. All 239 tests pass, clippy is clean, and fmt is clean. The implementation correctly satisfies all 12 validation assertions (VAL-DYN-014 through VAL-DYN-025) including cross-dynamic coherence tests, parameter sweep proving zero hardcoded thresholds, edge cases for empty/single mutation history, performance tests (<100ms for 10k mutations), and deep/wide tree handling (20+ depth, 100+ width). All new types are properly exported in lib.rs with appropriate derives (Debug, Clone, PartialEq, Serialize, Deserialize, Send, Sync).
